how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Paste a PGN or play directly against our engine. All formats supported.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our AI analyzes every move and identifies your recurring mistakes by category.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive a training plan that auto-updates after every game you play.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.t1_text: My ELO went up 120 points in 2 months. The personalized training plan was a game changer.
testimonials.t2_text: I finally understood why I kept losing closed positions. The profile analysis is incredible.
testimonials.t3_text: The AI coach knows exactly what my mistakes were in recent games. It's like having a GM by your side.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using the Elo Arc platform you fully accept these terms.

sections.acceptance_body: Using the Elo Arc platform implies full acceptance of these terms. By creating an account, you confirm that you have read and agree with everything in this document.
sections.service_body: Elo Arc is an AI-powered chess coaching platform offering game analysis, personalized training plans, and an adaptive engine. Analyses are AI-generated and do not replace professional human coaching.
sections.account_body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your registration information. Sharing access credentials between multiple users is prohibited. Elo Arc reserves the right to suspend accounts with suspicious activity.
sections.plans_body: The Free, Pawn ($7/mo), Knight ($19/mo) and King ($49/mo) plans are billed recurrently via Stripe. Prices may change with 30 days' email notice. Cancel anytime through the customer portal.
sections.refund_body: Full refund available within 7 days of the first charge. After 7 days, no partial refunds for unused periods. Exceptions reviewed case by case by support.
sections.ip_body: All platform content (interface, analyses, generated plans) is owned by Elo Arc or licensed for use on the platform. You retain ownership of the games you import.
sections.liability_body: Elo Arc does not guarantee specific rating or performance improvement. AI-generated analyses and plans may contain inaccuracies. The service is provided "as is," without guarantees of uninterrupted availability.
sections.conduct_body: Using the platform for illegal activity, spam, or system abuse is prohibited. Attempting to bypass plan limits via technical means is prohibited. Reselling or redistributing platform-generated content is prohibited.
sections.termination_body: You may terminate your account at any time in settings. Elo Arc may terminate accounts that violate these terms without prior notice.
sections.law_body: These terms are governed by applicable law. Disputes will be resolved preferably through mediation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is a priority. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how you can exercise your rights.

sections.data_body: Account data: name, email, password (stored as bcrypt hash). Usage data: imported games, analysis history, training plan. Payment data: processed by Stripe — we don't store card data. Technical data: IP, browser, device, for security and analytics.
sections.use_body: To deliver and personalize the AI coaching service. To process payments and manage subscriptions. To send service-related reports and communications. To improve the platform based on aggregated, anonymized usage.
sections.sharing_body: We don't sell personal data to third parties. We share data only with: Stripe (payments), Anthropic (AI analysis), Neon/PostgreSQL (database), and Render (hosting). All partners follow privacy policies compatible with LGPD/GDPR.
sections.security_body: Passwords stored with bcrypt (irreversible hash). Communication via HTTPS/TLS. JWT tokens with expiration. Database access restricted by environment variables.
sections.rights_body: Right of access: request a copy of your data. Right of correction: update incorrect data in your profile. Right of deletion: request full deletion of account and data. Right of portability: export your games and history as JSON. To exercise these rights, write to support@eloarc.com.
sections.cookies_body: We use essential cookies for authentication (JWT token) and preference cookies to save your chosen language. We do not use third-party tracking or advertising cookies.
sections.retention_body: Account data: kept while the account is active. After account deletion, data is removed within 30 days. Security logs are kept for 90 days.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Cookies are small text files stored by your browser. We use only what's strictly necessary.

sections.what_body: Cookies are small files websites save on your device to remember information across visits — like that you're logged in or your preferred language.
sections.essential_body: Used for authentication (JWT) and to keep your session secure. Without these cookies the site doesn't work, so they cannot be disabled.
sections.preference_body: Used only to save your chosen language (PT-BR or EN). Can be disabled, but you'll have to choose the language on every visit.
sections.manage_body: You can block or delete cookies anytime in your browser settings. Learn more at aboutcookies.org.
sections.consent_body: On your first visit we show a consent banner. Your choice is saved locally in your browser (localStorage).

banner.message: We use essential cookies to make the site work and preference cookies to remember your language. Learn more in our

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: Simple and direct policy — no fine print.

sections.policy_body: Full refund available within 7 days of the first charge — no questions asked.
sections.how_body: Email support@eloarc.com with subject "Refund" and your account email. No need to explain why.
sections.processing_body: Refunds are processed within 5 business days. The amount may take a few extra days to appear on your statement, depending on your bank.
sections.after_body: After 7 days, no partial refund for unused periods, but you can cancel the subscription immediately via the customer portal.
sections.exceptions_body: Special cases (duplicate charges, major technical failures, etc.) are reviewed individually by support.
